prompt: Create a monochromatic luxury editorial street-fashion photograph in a vertical 9:16 crop. A stylish adult man stands centered in the foreground on a wet upscale London street, facing the camera with a composed, confident posture, hands clasped at chest level. His face is intentionally obscured by a smooth rectangular blur in a warm skin-tone color, while the rest of the image remains realistic and sharp. He has dark slicked-back hair visible above the blur and wears an elegant deep olive green wool overcoat with broad lapels over a black turtleneck, plus black leather gloves. Behind him is a glossy black luxury SUV parked along the curb. The background shows white Georgian townhouse facades with tall windows, balconies, classical trim, and dark ivy climbing across the walls. On the right side is a boutique storefront with a pale beige awning reading “EST. 1928.” The pavement is damp with subtle reflections, suggesting recent rain. Use muted cool tones, soft overcast daylight, shallow depth of field, high-end editorial styling, cinematic realism, natural perspective, and a quiet old-money atmosphere. No extra people, no visible branding, no watermark, no additional text beyond the awning.
